title: Up-cast from SQL drops order information?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, order_num INTEGER NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table(id, value, order_num) VALUES (1, 'first', 10), (2, 'second', 20), (3, 'third', 30);
CREATE TABLE order_table(order_id INTEGER, order_value REAL, FOREIGN KEY(order_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT t.id, t.value, o.order_value FROM test_table t JOIN order_table o ON t.id = o.order_id ORDER BY o.order_value DESC;
key_bug_features: Up-cast from SQL drops order information
